tasks.label: Restart MusicToGP Server
tasks.command: Stop-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Start-Process -NoNewWindow 'D:\Projects\MusicToGP\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' '-m','uvicorn','main:app','--host','127.0.0.1','--port','8000' -WorkingDirectory 'D:\Projects\MusicToGP\backend' -RedirectStandardOutput '..\uvicorn_out.txt' -RedirectStandardError '..\uvicorn_err.txt'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; Start-Process 'http://127.0.0.1:8000'
